description_long: This is a standard-sized aluminum beer can with a dark, metallic blue and black color scheme. The can features bold, vertical typography in white and light blue, with the word 'LIGHT' prominently displayed. Surrounding the can is a dynamic, swirling effect resembling splashes or clouds of condensation, adding a sense of coldness and refreshment. The top of the can is equipped with a classic pull tab, and the back label contains nutritional and product information in fine print. The overall design is modern and energetic, with a glossy finish that reflects light and enhances the visual appeal.
description: A metallic blue and black beer can with bold vertical text and swirling condensation effects, featuring a glossy, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label with bold vertical text and prominent condensation effects swirling around the can.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the pull tab and the continuation of the swirling condensation, with the label text still visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the product information label and barcode, with the swirling condensation effect wrapping around the can.
description_view_3: Side view showing the vertical label text and the dynamic condensation effect, with the pull tab partially visible.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features bold, vertical typography in white and light blue against a dark blue and black gradient background. Swirling condensation graphics add a sense of coldness and energy, with a modern, glossy finish.
